case_title: ROBINSON, SHEILA ANN VS SING LEE LAUNDRY & CLEANERS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $69.39 FILED BY ROBINSON, SHEILA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT SING LEE LAUNDRY & CLEANERS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-1990 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, SHEILA ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SING LEE LAUNDRY & CLEANERS. $69.39 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $97.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SING LEE LAUNDRY & CLEANERS. HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF MAR-01-1993, GRANTED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $29.22 ACCRUED INTEREST, $44.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SING LEE LAUNDRY & CLEANERS.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SING LEE LAUNDRY & CLEANERS.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ROBINSON, SHEILA ANN ASSIGNED TO LOUIS HOP LEE
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, SHEILA ANN HEARING SET FOR MAY-10-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MAY-10-1993, OFF CALENDAR AS TO PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, SHEILA ANN
THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SING LEE LAUNDRY & CLEANERS.
